# JobTracker AI – llms.txt

> JobTracker AI is a free, AI-powered job application tracker and document generator for UK and international job seekers.

## What it does

- **Application tracking**: Kanban-style pipeline to track every job from Saved through to Offer or Rejected
- **Job scraping**: Paste a URL from LinkedIn, Indeed, or other boards — AI extracts title, company, salary, description and requirements automatically
- **AI CV / Resume generation**: Tailors your existing CV to each specific role using Google Gemini 2.5. UK 2-page format, ATS-optimised, never fabricates information
- **AI Cover letter generation**: UK-convention letters with proper salutation rules, industry-adapted tone, 1-page target
- **AI Supporting statements**: Auto-detects essential criteria and writes STAR-format responses for public sector, academic, and executive roles
- **Block-based document editor**: Rich text editor with live A4 PDF preview and one-click export
- **Interview tracking**: Log interview stages and outcomes per application
- **Application reminders**: Set deadline reminders per role
- **Profile management**: Store experience, education, skills, projects, certifications, and achievements once — reused across all documents

## Technology

- Built with Next.js 14 (App Router), MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- AI powered by Google Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash with fallback to gemini-2.0-flash)
- Authentication via JWT with email verification
- PDF generation client-side via @react-pdf/renderer

## Target users

UK and international job seekers at all levels — graduate to C-suite — across all industries including corporate, public sector, academic, creative, and technical roles.

## Public pages

- `/` — Landing page with feature overview
- `/auth/login` — Sign in
- `/auth/register` — Create account
- `/legal/privacy` — Privacy policy (GDPR / UK DPA 2018 compliant)
- `/legal/terms` — Terms of service
- `/legal/cookies` — Cookie policy

## Authenticated-only pages (not crawlable)

- `/dashboard` — Application pipeline
- `/profile/` — User profile editor
- `/document/` — Document editor and library
